basicDetails.schemeName: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: 100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer Gujarat

nodalDepartmentName.label: Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Distribution of Seeds of more productive varieties / Hybrid varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies, etc,. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area (TASP)" with a component "100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer" is introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to assist Adivasi and Scheduled Tribe farmers in tribal and non-tribal areas to achieve higher agricultural production and improve their livelihoods. Through this scheme, subsidies are provided on items such as seeds of more productive/hybrid varieties, fertilizers, plant protection equipment, tarpaulins, micronutrients, water carrying pipelines, and pump sets.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
> **100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer:** - 100% soluble chemical fertilizers/nano-fertilizers of FCO-approved grade subject to 75% of the purchase price or ₹ 750/- per hectare, will be eligible for subsidy. (subject to a maximum of four hectares per account)
> **Remark:** As per conditions No. 5, 16, 17, 19 and 22 of [Appendix-1](https://mariyojana.gujarat.gov.in/Schemeatoz.aspx). (Refer Scheme No. 35). > **Frequency:** Every year.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to help Adivasi farmers and tribal cultivators increase crop production and improve their livelihood. Through this scheme, subsidies are provided for various agricultural inputs and equipment such as seeds, fertilizers, plant protection equipment, and pump sets.

children.text: The scheme "Distribution of Seeds of more productive varieties / Hybrid varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies, etc,. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area (TASP)" with a component "100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer" is introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to assist Adivasi and Scheduled Tribe farmers in tribal and non-tribal areas to achieve higher agricultural production and improve their livelihoods. Through this scheme, subsidies are provided on items such as seeds of more productive/hybrid varieties, fertilizers, plant protection equipment, tarpaulins, micronutrients, water carrying pipelines, and pump sets.

100% soluble chemical fertilizers/nano-fertilizers of FCO-approved grade subject to 75% of the purchase price or ₹ 750/- per hectare, will be eligible for subsidy. (subject to a maximum of four hectares per account)
As per conditions No. 5, 16, 17, 19 and 22 of
Approach the Gram Sevak in your village for access to the "100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer" under the scheme.

applicationProcess.process_md: Approach the Gram Sevak in your village for access to the "100% Soluble Chemical Fertilizer/Nano Fertilizer" under the scheme.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should belong to a Scheduled Tribe. 1. The applicant should be a farmer. 1. The applicant should be located in tribal areas OR be a tribal cultivator residing outside tribal areas. 1. The scheme excludes farmers from Dang district.

children.text: The applicant should belong to a Scheduled Tribe.
The applicant should be a farmer.
The applicant should be located in tribal areas OR be a tribal cultivator residing outside tribal areas.
The scheme excludes farmers from Dang district.
